inputs.label: Attic Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area of the attic space in square feet.

inputs.label: Ventilation Ratio (1:X)
inputs.businessContext: Required total net free area expressed as 1 square foot per X square feet of attic area. Common values: 150 for standard construction, 300 with certain vapor barriers.

inputs.label: Ridge Vent NFA per Foot
inputs.businessContext: Net free area rating of the ridge vent product, in square inches per linear foot.

inputs.label: Exhaust Split Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of total ventilation area that should be provided by ridge exhaust. Typically 0.5 for balanced intake/exhaust.

primary.label: Required Ridge Vent Length
primary.description: Linear feet of ridge vent needed to achieve the required exhaust net free area.

breakdown.label: Total Required NFA
breakdown.description: Total net free ventilation area required for the attic.

breakdown.label: Exhaust NFA
breakdown.description: Net free area needed at the ridge (exhaust).
